description_long: This modern house features a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan layout with large glass windows and sliding doors that connect the interior to an expansive outdoor deck. The exterior combines dark and light wall panels, with a prominent terracotta-tiled patio at the front and a wooden deck at the rear. The backyard includes a swimming pool, palm trees, and a shaded lounge area, creating a resort-like atmosphere. The house is single-story, with multiple rooms visible, including a living area, bedrooms, and a kitchen, all oriented around the outdoor spaces. Minimalist landscaping with shrubs and planters adds greenery to the sides. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a seamless indoor-outdoor flow.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, a terracotta patio, and a backyard featuring a pool and deck. The design is open, geometric, and emphasizes indoor-outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the terracotta-tiled patio, main glass entry doors, and a glimpse of the open-plan interior.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the transition from patio to wooden deck, and the pool area with palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backyard, swimming pool, shaded lounge, and the open connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's length, the pool, and the relationship between the patio and deck areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows and sliding glass doors in asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features wide glass doors opening onto a terracotta-tiled patio, with no steps or porch, emphasizing a seamless transition from exterior to interior.
